steps.title: Use the evidence relationship
steps.content: The coin dated 337-341 CE and era-appropriate building materials support the theory that the amphitheater dates to the fourth century. The blank needs a verb meaning supply evidence.

steps.title: Reject opposing verbs
steps.content: Choice A means reject, not support. Choice C means govern or control. Choice D means be unwilling to accept. The verb that fits discoveries supplying evidence for a theory is needed here. The answer is B.
